description.value: **Benefit:** You get a +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls with ranged weapons at ranges of up to 30 feet. Editor’s Note Do I add the extra damage from Point-Blank Shot to the splash damage dealt by a splash weapon? No, the extra damage from Point-Blank Shot only applies to the target of a direct hit with a splash weapon (including direct hits from an alchemist’s bomb). [ Source ]
